name: ai-context-chip
title: AI Context Chip
description: Removable token for one piece of context sent with an assistant prompt, with a sensitive-data marker.

props.name: kind
props.description: Drives the leading icon so context types are scannable at a glance.

props.name: sensitive
props.description: Marks context carrying identifiable or otherwise sensitive data. Adds a lock icon, a warning tint, and a hidden "Contains sensitive data" string.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Removes the item from the outgoing context. Omit for a fixed chip.

props.name: removeLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the remove control. Defaults from the label when it is a string.

clinicalNotes: Removing a chip changes only what leaves the building with the next prompt — it must never delete, hide, or amend the underlying clinical record, and consumers should not wire it to a destructive action. The sensitive marker exists so a clinician can see, before sending, that identifiable data is attached; it is conveyed by icon and hidden text as well as tint, because a warning that only exists in colour is no warning at all.
notes: Designed to sit inside ai-context-bar, but works standalone anywhere the outgoing context needs to be visible.
